creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 232170
minimized reproducer

Attached is a minimized reproducer.  It was difficult to minimize this one.  Some observations:

 - removal of the DIP2PIXEL function and its associated array member
   causes compilation to be very fast
 - removal of some array members causes compilation to eventually
   succeed.  I suspect some sort of O(n^2) runtime processing
   initialisers in the SettingInfo array
